narrative:
Cols 12-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,429 registered voters, with 77.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.4 percentage points.
